---
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# TEACHING
:::

## Current academic responsibilities and courses delivered.

::: course-item
### [CHEM G552]{.course-code} Advanced Inorganic Chemistry

<br> [Second Semester 2025-2026]{.semester-tag}
:::

::: course-item
### [CHEM F111]{.course-code} General Chemistry

<br> [Second Semester 2025-2026]{.semester-tag}
:::
